Who I am

About Me 🤖

I'm a motivated Frontend and Python developer pursuing a B.Sc. in Computer Science at Menoufia National University. I build responsive web applications, integrate REST APIs, and develop scalable software using React.js and Python.

Beyond web development, I'm steadily building toward a career in machine learning — completing an ML engineering internship, prompt engineering and AI programs, and hands-on classification projects. I'm also a team lead who enjoys coordinating people as much as writing code, and an active member of the Google Developer Group Menoufia community.
